PLATES — Theme Catalogue

cantabria-verde

Default theme · All dict targets · ID: cantabria-verde

Color palette

BG#1a3d22--color-bg
Surface#2a5c34--color-surface
Surface 2#3d6645--color-surface2
Accent#f0c040--color-accent
Acc. hover#f5d060--color-accent-hover
Text#f0f4e8--color-text
Muted#8db89a--color-text-muted
Border#3d6645--color-border
Danger#c0392b--color-danger
Success#27ae60--color-success

CSS custom properties

VariableValueUsage
--color-bg#1a3d22Page / app background
--color-surface#2a5c34Cards, panels, modals
--color-surface2#3d6645Inputs, nested surfaces
--color-accent#f0c040Primary CTA, highlights, logo text
--color-accent-hover#f5d060Accent hover state
--color-text#f0f4e8Body text, labels
--color-text-muted#8db89aSubtitles, placeholders, ghost buttons
--color-border#3d6645Dividers, input borders
--color-danger#c0392bDestructive actions, error states
--color-success#27ae60Valid word, confirmed state

Typography

PLATES — The license plate word game

Body text in off-white with a subtle green tint. Comfortable on dark backgrounds.

Secondary / muted text for subtitles, hints, and placeholders.


VITE_DICT_TARGET  Monospace for code values and tokens.

Buttons

Primary — gold fill, near-black text. Maximum contrast. Use for the single most important action per screen.
Secondary — near-black fill, gold border and text. Use for important but non-primary actions.
Danger — solid red. Use for destructive or irreversible actions (abandon, delete).
Ghost — transparent, muted border. Use for back navigation and low-emphasis actions.
Close ✕ — circular, near-black. Use to dismiss overlays and modals.

License plate component

1234 · PLT
Standard plate
1221 · PLT
×2 BONUS
Jackpot plate (capicúa)

White background · black border (5px) · rounded corners (14px) · 4 corner rivets.
Jackpot plates: gold border + gold halo + amber digits + ×N badge + info button.

Status tags

✓ Valid word ✕ Invalid ⏳ Your turn ℹ Daily puzzle

Input

Surface-2 background · border turns accent on focus.

Splash screen — animated logo

PWQXBMZKP
LJRVNHGDL
AZGCFTYSA
TXCQKFNVT
ERVJZWHME
SGHMQBDFS

The license plate word game

Pure CSS animation — transform: translateY() only. GPU-accelerated, no blur, no JS.
Each reel starts and ends on the correct letter. Stops are staggered by 4% to simulate a slot machine.

⭐ Jackpot plate — capicúa

The digits of this plate form a palindrome (read the same forwards and backwards). This activates a ×2 multiplier on the digit bonus component of your final score.
